extDescription.message: Remote Nostr signing via NIP-46. Keys never touch the browser. Works with any bunker; Heartwood adds derived identities.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the browser's extension manager and stores.

setupIntro.message: Enter a signer or bridge address, or paste a bunker URI.

connect.description: Button that starts pairing with the entered address.

orPairByQr.description: Divider label between address pairing and QR pairing.

pairByQrBtn.description: Button revealing the QR pairing flow. Keep the word nostrconnect untranslated.

qrRelayTitle.description: Tooltip on the relay input of the QR pairing flow.

scanWithSigner.message: Scan with your signer, or paste the URI into it.

waitingEllipsis.description: Button label while the QR pairing waits for the signer.

pairingExpired.message: Pairing expired. Generate a new QR.

connectedStatus.description: Status line after successful QR pairing.

addAnotherSigner.description: Placeholder of the add-signer input on the main screen.

add.description: Small button that adds an entry (signer, kind rule, site rule, method rule).

showAddSigner.description: Button revealing the add-signer input. Keep the leading plus sign.

remove.description: Tooltip of the button that removes a signer instance.

removeSignerConfirm.description: Confirmation dialog before removing a signer.

connectingEllipsis.description: Shown in place of a public key while an instance is connecting.

connectingBtn.description: Button label while pairing is in progress.

enterSignerAddress.message: Enter a signer or bridge address (e.g. heartwood.local:3000)
enterSignerAddress.description: Validation error when the address field is empty.

noResponseFromBackground.message: No response from background - try reloading the extension

openApprovalPage.description: Button opening the signer's browser approval page (auth_url).

reconnectingIn.description: Countdown before an automatic reconnect attempt. $SECONDS$ is a number.

approveConnectionOnSigner.message: Approve this connection on your signer.

activePersona.description: Section label above the currently active identity.

defaultName.description: Name shown for the identity of a standard (non-Heartwood) signer.

unnamed.description: Fallback name for an identity without a label.

personas.description: Section label of the Heartwood identity list.

purposeNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder of the input naming a new derived identity.

derive.description: Button that derives a new identity on the Heartwood device.

personaRequiresHeartwood.description: Sentence fragment followed by a link reading 'Heartwood'.

runSignTestHint.message: Run a sign test before using sites.

test.description: Button that runs a signing test.

approveOnSigner.message: Approve the request on your signer device.

waitingBtn.description: Disabled button label while a sign test waits for the signer.

zeroRelays.description: Initial relay summary before any status is known.

relaysConnected.description: Relay health summary. $UP$ and $TOTAL$ are numbers.

signingPolicies.description: Collapsible section heading for the policy editor.

kindNumberPlaceholder.description: Placeholder of the numeric input for a Nostr event kind.

privacyModeHint.message: Hide Bark from every site except those with a site rule below

methods.description: Heading of the per-site method override list.

kindOverrides.description: Heading of the per-site kind override list.

noKindOverrides.message: No kind overrides for this site

clickToChange.message: Click to change: allow → ask → deny
clickToChange.description: Tooltip on the cycling policy action badge.

optionAllow.description: Policy action in the add-site dropdown.

optionAsk.description: Policy action in the add-site dropdown.

optionDeny.description: Policy action in the add-site dropdown.

actionAllow.description: Policy action badge text, lower case.

actionAsk.description: Policy action badge text, lower case.

actionDeny.description: Policy action badge text, lower case.

kindProfileMetadata.description: Friendly name for Nostr event kind 0.

kindContactList.description: Friendly name for Nostr event kind 3.

kindRelayList.description: Friendly name for Nostr event kind 10002.

kindN.description: Fallback label for an event kind without a friendly name. $N$ is a number.

siteCardOn.message: Bark is on for this site

siteCardOff.message: Bark is off for this site

enableOnSite.description: Button enabling Bark on the current site.

disableOnSite.description: Button disabling Bark on the current site.

reloadHint.message: Reload the page if it was already open.

siteCardTabOnly.message: Active on this page. Bark switches off when you leave this site.

loadingRequest.description: Approval window placeholder while the request loads.

approveKindProfile.description: Title-case name for event kind 0 in the approval window.

approveKindContacts.description: Title-case name for event kind 3 in the approval window.

approveKindRelays.description: Title-case name for event kind 10002 in the approval window.

approveKindGatedDeposit.description: Title-case name for event kind 27117 (V4V paywall deposit terms, never published) in the approval window.

approveKindGatedContent.description: Title-case name for event kind 30808 (public V4V paywall event) in the approval window.

signTitle.description: Approval window title for a signing request. $KIND$ is e.g. 'Kind 1' or 'Profile Metadata'.

wantsToSignEvent.description: $ORIGIN$ is the requesting site, already wrapped in bold markup.

wantsPublicKey.message: $ORIGIN$ wants to know your public key

wantsRelayList.message: $ORIGIN$ wants to know your relay list

wantsEncryptLegacy.message: $ORIGIN$ wants to encrypt a legacy message

wantsDecryptLegacy.message: $ORIGIN$ wants to decrypt a legacy message

wantsListIdentities.message: $ORIGIN$ wants to list the identities on your Heartwood device

wantsDeriveIdentity.message: $ORIGIN$ wants to derive a new identity on your Heartwood device

wantsSwitchIdentity.message: $ORIGIN$ wants to switch your active signing identity

wantsCallMethod.description: $METHOD$ is a technical method name, already wrapped in code markup.

proposedProfile.description: Section label above the profile fields a site wants to publish.

deny.description: Approval window button rejecting the request.

allowOnce.description: Approval window button allowing this single request.

trustSite.description: Approval window button trusting the site for future routine requests.
